value.fullName: (A1) UK / EEA Passport
value.label: (A1) UK / EEA Passport

value.fullName: (A3) Passport or National identity card, issued by EEA Agreement State
value.label: (A3) Passport or National identity card, issued by EEA Agreement State

value.fullName: (A4) UK residence permit
value.label: (A4) UK residence permit

value.fullName: (A6) Passport or other Travel doc. showing indefinite leave to enter/ remain in UK
value.label: (A6) Passport or other Travel doc. showing indefinite leave to enter/ remain in UK

value.fullName: (A8) Registration card showing entitlement to take employment in UK
value.label: (A8) Registration card showing entitlement to take employment in UK

value.fullName: NI NO. + (B) birth certificate issues in UK
value.label: NI NO. + (B) birth certificate issues in UK

value.fullName: NI NO. + (C) birth certificate issues in the Channel Islands, Isle of Man, Ireland
value.label: NI NO. + (C) birth certificate issues in the Channel Islands, Isle of Man, Ireland

value.fullName: NI NO. + (D) certificate of registration or naturalization as a British Citizen
value.label: NI NO. + (D) certificate of registration or naturalization as a British Citizen

value.fullName: NI NO. + (E) letter issued by Home Office granting Indefinite Leave to enter or Remain in the UK
value.label: NI NO. + (E) letter issued by Home Office granting Indefinite Leave to enter or Remain in the UK

value.fullName: NI NO. + (F) immigration status doc issued by Home Office and endorsed with UK residence.
value.label: NI NO. + (F) immigration status doc issued by Home Office and endorsed with UK residence.

value.fullName: NI NO. + (G) letter issues by Home Office indicating subsisting leave to remain + work
value.label: NI NO. + (G) letter issues by Home Office indicating subsisting leave to remain + work

value.fullName: Work Permit + (I) passport or other Travel doc. showing current Leave to Enter/Remain in UK
value.label: Work Permit + (I) passport or other Travel doc. showing current Leave to Enter/Remain in UK

value.fullName: Work Permit + (J) letter issues by Home Office showing current Leave to Enter/Remain in UK
value.label: Work Permit + (J) letter issues by Home Office showing current Leave to Enter/Remain in UK
